faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions about DeutschTest
faq.cta_desc: Our team is here to help. Contact us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
faq.page_desc: Frequently asked questions about DeutschTest: exams, pricing, registration, preparation and technical support.

exams_1.q: What German exams are available on DeutschTest?
exams_1.a: We currently offer complete simulations for Goethe B1 and Goethe B2 exams. We also cover ÖSD and TELC formats which share similar structures. A1, A2 and C1 levels will be added soon.

exams_2.q: Are the simulations in line with official exams?
exams_2.a: Yes, absolutely! Our simulations strictly follow the format, duration and assessment criteria of official Goethe-Institut, ÖSD and TELC exams. Our content is created by certified examiners with real exam experience.

exams_3.a: Our AI system analyzes your written and oral productions according to official criteria (content, coherence, grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation). You receive detailed feedback with your strengths, areas for improvement and an estimate of your potential score.

exams_4.q: How many tests can I take?
exams_4.a: With Single access, you take one complete mock exam. With Unlimited 30-day access, you can take as many tests as you like for 30 days. Ideal for intensive preparation before your official exam.

exams_5.q: Are the audio recordings in line with real exam conditions?
exams_5.a: Yes, our audio recordings use native speakers with standard accents (German, Austrian, Swiss). The quality and speed match exactly the official exam conditions.

account_1.q: How do I create an account?
account_1.a: Click "Start for free" at the top of the page. Enter your email, create a password and confirm. You will receive a confirmation email. That's it! No credit card is required to create your account.

account_2.a: We accept payments by bank card (Visa, Mastercard), Mobile Money (MTN, Orange), and PayPal. All payments are secured and encrypted.

account_3.q: Can I change my plan after signing up?
account_3.a: Yes, you can switch from Single to Unlimited access at any time from your dashboard. The price difference will be calculated automatically.

account_4.q: How can I reset my password?
account_4.a: Click "Forgot password?" on the login page. Enter your email and you will receive a reset link valid for 24h. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact us.

technical_1.q: On which devices can I use DeutschTest?
technical_1.a: DeutschTest works on computers (Windows, Mac, Linux), tablets and smartphones (iOS, Android). We recommend a computer with a microphone for oral sections, but you can also use your phone.

technical_2.q: Do I need an Internet connection?
technical_2.a: Yes, a stable Internet connection is required to take exams, load audio and receive corrections. We recommend a connection of at least 2 Mbps for the best experience.

technical_3.q: What should I do if I have a technical problem during an exam?
technical_3.a: Your progress is automatically saved. In case of a problem (Internet outage, bug), you can resume exactly where you left off. If the problem persists, contact our support via live chat or email at lfogouang39{'@'}gmail.com.
